Test_Case_Description: නව user කෙනෙක් successfully register වෙනවාද test කිරීම

2. Enter valid username
3. Enter valid email

5. Confirm password
6. Click Register button
Expected_Result: User successfully registered; Redirected to login page; Success message displayed

2. Enter existing username
3. Enter email and password

Test_Case_Description: SQL injection attacks prevent වෙනවාද

Expected_Result: Attack prevented; No unauthorized access; Error handled gracefully

Test_Case_Description: XSS attacks prevent වෙනවාද

Expected_Result: Script not executed; Input sanitized; Displayed as text

Test_Case_Description: CSRF tokens properly validate වෙනවාද
Test_Steps: 1. Intercept form submission\n2. Remove or modify CSRF token\n3. Submit form
Expected_Result: Request rejected; Error message; Form not processed

Test_Case_Description: Session hijacking prevent වෙනවාද
